2026-03-24T22:54:51.0386762Z [command]/usr/bin/git submodule foreach --recursive sh -c "git config --local --name-only --get-regexp 'http\.https\:\/\/github\.com\/\.extraheader' && git config --local --unset-all 'http.https://github.com/.extraheader' || :"

2026-03-24T22:54:51.0388567Z [command]/usr/bin/git config --local --name-only --get-regexp ^includeIf\.gitdir:
2026-03-24T22:54:51.0389543Z [command]/usr/bin/git submodule foreach --recursive git config --local --show-origin --name-only --get-regexp remote.origin.url
